items.situation: grand reopening of the renovated student game room and arcade lounge
items.announcement: The student game room on the second floor of the campus center will reopen this Friday after a two-month renovation. We've added four new arcade cabinets, two air hockey tables, and a large-screen area for console tournaments. The grand reopening celebration starts at 3 p.m. and includes free snacks while supplies last. Please note that a valid student ID is required to check out controllers and equipment at the front counter. The room's new hours will be 10 a.m. to midnight daily, extended from the previous 10 p.m. closing time. Come by this weekend to try out the new setup before regular hours resume Monday.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the reopening of the renovated game room
options.B: To advertise a new console tournament schedule
options.C: To recruit student staff for the front counter
options.D: To announce the game room's permanent closure

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是宣布学生活动中心游戏室完成翻修后重新开放。B错误（too_narrow）：赛事只是新增设施之一，并非通知重点。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知未提及招募员工。D错误（reversed_intent）：与通知内容相反，游戏室是重新开放而非永久关闭。

questions.stem: What is required for students to check out equipment?

options.A: A refundable deposit paid at the front counter
options.B: Advance reservation through the recreation website
options.C: A valid student ID shown at the counter
options.D: Sign-up for the console tournament in advance

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明"a valid student ID is required to check out controllers and equipment at the front counter"。A错误（wrong_detail）：通知未提及押金。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提到需要在网上预约。D错误（misattributed_detail）：报名参加锦标赛与领取设备是两回事，通知未将二者关联。

items.situation: night market with food trucks and student vendor booths
items.announcement: We're excited to announce the second annual Campus Night Market this Thursday from 6 to 9 p.m. on the East Quad. Over a dozen food trucks will line the perimeter, and student clubs will run vendor booths selling handmade crafts, artwork, and baked goods. Since the quad has limited outlets, vendors bringing their own equipment must submit a request to the student activities office by Tuesday. Admission is free, but food and merchandise purchases are cash or card at each individual vendor. If the weather turns severe, the market will shift to the fieldhouse and open thirty minutes later than planned. We hope you'll stop by and support your fellow students' small businesses.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To advertise handmade crafts sold by one club
options.B: To announce a night market featuring food trucks and vendors
options.C: To recruit student vendors for future markets
options.D: To cancel the previously scheduled night market

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知宣布本周四将举办以美食车和学生摊位为主的夜市活动。A错误（too_narrow）：手工艺品只是其中一类摊位商品，不是整体主旨。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知并非招募未来集市的商贩。D错误（reversed_intent）：与内容相反，活动是照常举行而非取消。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the East Quad's power supply?

options.A: It will be fully replaced before next year's market
options.B: Vendors bringing equipment must submit a request by Tuesday
options.C: It is funded entirely by student activity fees
options.D: It has limited capacity for extra electrical equipment

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知提到"the quad has limited outlets"，且自带设备的商贩需提前申请，可推断该场地电力供应有限，无法满足所有商贩用电需求。A错误（over_inference）：通知没有提到要更换电力设施。B错误（literal_restatement）：这是通知中直接陈述的内容，并非推断。C错误（unrelated_inference）：通知未涉及资金来源。

items.situation: walk-in resume critique clinic hosted by career center advisors
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Career Center is hosting a walk-in resume critique clinic every Tuesday and Thursday this month from 1 to 4 p.m. in Suite 220 of Founders Hall. No appointment is necessary, but students should bring a printed copy of their current resume to receive feedback from a career advisor. Each session lasts about fifteen minutes, and advisors will focus on formatting, clarity, and tailoring content to specific job postings. Because the clinic tends to get busy close to closing time, we recommend arriving before 3 p.m. if you'd like a shorter wait. Digital versions can also be emailed in advance for advisors to review beforehand. We hope to see many of you there this month.

questions.stem: What should students bring to the resume critique clinic?

options.C: A printed copy of their current resume
options.D: A digital portfolio saved to a flash drive

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明学生应"bring a printed copy of their current resume"以获得指导老师的反馈。A错误（wrong_detail）：通知没有提到需要填写申请表。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知未提及推荐人名单。D错误（misattributed_detail）：通知提到可提前发送电子版，但并非要求存在U盘里带来。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about arriving close to closing time?

options.A: Students may face a longer wait for feedback
options.B: The clinic will start turning students away entirely
options.D: The clinic will extend its hours next month

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知说诊所"tends to get busy close to closing time"并建议3点前到场以减少等待，由此可推断临近结束时段等待时间会更长。B错误（over_inference）：通知没有说会拒绝学生。C错误（literal_restatement）：这是通知中直接给出的建议，并非推断。D错误（unrelated_inference）：通知未提及延长时间。

items.situation: housing office info session on dorm accessibility and accommodation requests
items.announcement: Attention students living in campus housing. The Residence Life Office will hold an information session next Wednesday at 5 p.m. in the Community Center lounge about requesting dorm accessibility accommodations for the fall term. Staff will explain the documentation required, including a note from a healthcare provider, and walk through the online request portal step by step. Students who need accommodations such as a ground-floor room, private bathroom, or specialized furniture should submit requests through the housing portal by August 1st to guarantee placement before move-in. Seating at the session is limited, so please reserve a spot through the Residence Life website in advance. Light refreshments will be provided.

questions.stem: What must students submit to guarantee an accommodation before move-in?

options.A: A request approved by their academic advisor
options.B: A housing deposit paid in full
options.C: A note submitted directly to the Community Center
options.D: A request through the housing portal by August 1st

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知明确说明学生需要"submit requests through the housing portal by August 1st to guarantee placement before move-in"。A错误（wrong_detail）：通知未提及需要学业导师批准。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提到住宿押金。C错误（misattributed_detail）：医疗证明是提交给住宿系统的一部分材料，并非直接交到社区中心。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students requesting a ground-floor room?

options.A: They will automatically be placed in a single room
options.B: They may need supporting documentation from a healthcare provider
options.C: They must submit requests through the online portal
options.D: They will be charged an additional housing fee

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知提到工作人员会解释所需材料，"including a note from a healthcare provider"，可推断申请此类住宿便利的学生可能需要提供医疗证明。A错误（over_inference）：通知没有说会自动分配单人间。C错误（literal_restatement）：这是通知中直接陈述的申请方式，并非推断。D错误（unrelated_inference）：通知未提及额外费用。

items.situation: campus counseling center info session on new walk-in mental health hours
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Counseling Center is pleased to announce new walk-in hours starting this Monday, available every weekday from 9 a.m. to 11 a.m. in Wellness Hall, Room 150. No appointment is needed during these hours, and sessions are first-come, first-served with a licensed counselor. These walk-in slots are meant for students who need to talk with someone the same day rather than wait for a scheduled appointment. Please bring your student ID when you check in at the front desk. Scheduled appointments outside these hours are still available and can be booked through the student health portal. We encourage anyone who could use support to stop by.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce new walk-in hours at the Counseling Center
options.B: To describe how to book a scheduled appointment
options.D: To announce the elimination of walk-in counseling

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是宣布咨询中心新增每日上午的免预约时段。B错误（too_narrow）：预约方式只是通知末尾附带提及，并非重点。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知未涉及招募咨询师。D错误（reversed_intent）：与内容相反，通知是新增而非取消免预约服务。

questions.stem: What must students bring to check in for a walk-in session?

options.A: A referral from an academic advisor
options.D: A confirmation number from the health portal

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明"Please bring your student ID when you check in at the front desk"。A错误（wrong_detail）：通知未提及需要导师转介信。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提到保险证明。D错误（misattributed_detail）：确认码是针对通过健康门户预约的场景，与免预约时段无关。
